MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-27-2017 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings (Doris Wong)
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steven Dillick, Esq. (415-399-8777) for Plaintiff/Moving party MICKEY WONG, YIU CHEONG CONSTRUCTION CO INC..
John Wiley, Esq. (415-831-0500) for Defendant/opposing party Doris Wong.
Christina Chen, Esq. (415-441-8778) for Defendant/opposing party Bo Kin Wong.

The Court announces the Tentative ruling on both motions and informs Counsel they are going to trial. There is enough on the pleadings. All sides ARGUED. Plaintiff argues there is no factual foundation for allegation of trust relationship on Mickey Wong. Defendant Doris Wong Argues. Defendant Bo Kin Wong argues money paid by Doris, mother and father. Plaintiff argues same defect on the second motion; Mickey Wong has become trustee of Doris Wong, no factual foundation. Defendant Doris Wong argues Plaintiff has taken money for rent, has possession of property, breach of fiduciary duty. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DORIS WONG's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is DENIED. To the extent this motion is based on CCP 438, it is denied as untimely.
